title: Need a specialist Houston, TX

posts.author: Pkrutilek (Pamela Krutilek)
posts.cookedHtml: We need a specialist to develop custom features in Monday. We currently use the app for basic needs. Anyone know of a developer in the Houston area? Otherwise, accomplishing this virtually is an option. We do not have the time or knowledge to do this.

posts.author: CristyLimegrover (Cristy Limegrover )
posts.cookedHtml:
Good morning @Pkrutilek - I did respond on another post, but wanted to touch base here as well since I just saw this post. . .

I am located in Texas, I can travel to Houston if you prefer to have in-session meetings, but I have found that working with clients from California - Texas is possible in a virtual manner. I’d love to hear more about what you’re looking for and how I may be able to assist.

Sincerely,

Cristy

posts.author: Pkrutilek (Pamela Krutilek)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Christie,

Thank you for your response. Below is a description of what we have in mind. We would also like to have someone for support in Monday and the addition when needed.

Let me know if you have any additional questions.

Our company provides outdoor “beautification” services to high end residential customers in North Houston and the surrounding areas. We do landscaping, lighting, outdoor kitchens, decks, pergolas, etc. We are interested in having a customized addition to the Monday app which we already use. We are a small company and are working to become more efficient. Our sales people use Monday to keep track of appointments and receive leads from the office. This is my best explanation of the additional features we would like to add.

We currently have white boards in our office listing the schedule for the week. Each sales person is represented in a different color. (Yes, this is pretty archaic). We want to change this. Our plan is to have two large screens displaying the schedule. We would like salespeople to have access and to the content and be able to add, change or remove their jobs from the boards. It would be great to be able to switch to monthly view as well. We also need options to block of the time needed to complete the job (hours). It would be great to have an option to and additional information pertaining to the scheduled job, allowing to select that job and view the additional information (list supplies, etc).

I plan to have a staff meeting at which time I will obtain any additional information requested by whomever takes on the project.

Please let me know if this sounds like something you can do (or that can be done). Please include an estimate of cost as well.

Sincerely,

Pamela Krutilek
Operations Manager
Yardbirds Landscaping
